name: normalize-dti-frontmatter
title: Normalize frontmatter and interface files across the category
description: agent-skill-review and goal-meta-skill lack allowed-tools and argument-hint that the other 5 skills carry. Interface files are inconsistent: agent-skill-review has only platform-named openai.yaml; goal-meta-skill has both interface.yaml and openai.yaml (duplication). Decide a category policy and normalize.
